calendar.matters:
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Text Ruling

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered Ccp 473.5 And Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DANE ZUCCARO's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered CCP 473.5 And Quash Service Of Summons is denied. Defendant does not sufficiently establish that he lacked actual notice of the action in time to defend. Defendant's declaration raises more questions than it answers and defendant does not explain why/how he did not receive any of plaintiff's numerous mailings. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DANE ZUCCARO's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint is taken off calendar given the above ruling. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

William T. Webb, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DANIEL CHANG.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DANE ZUCCARO and ZFC CONCEPTS LLC, a California limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Daniel Chang sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Self-represented Defendant Patrick J. McMillan present in court.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment in favor of Plaintiff DANIEL CHANG and against Defendants DANE ZUCCARO and ZFC CONCEPTS LLC, a California limited liability company for damages in the amount of $135,720.80
Costs $1,718.46
Attorney's fees $35,514.00
For a total Judgment in the amount of $172,953.26
Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare proposed judgment and submit it for the court's signature.
